title: providerbench report
description: Output of `providerbench run --json`. Submit runs as one file per run in data/results/.

category.description: benchmark category, e.g. compute, ai, storage

created_at.description: UTC timestamp at which this individual benchmark run began. Historical comparisons must never combine different measurement campaigns.

sample.description: true = illustrative placeholder data, not a real measurement

quick.description: true = produced with --quick. Quick workloads are smaller and shorter; quick reports never enter ranked aggregates.

name.description: provider company slug, e.g. hetzner, vercel, aws

product.description: the offering tested, e.g. cloud-vps, sandbox, ec2

plan.description: plan or instance type, e.g. cax21

measurement.description: Coordinates repeated runs. Aggregate repeats to a per-host median before calculating cross-host percentiles.

campaign_id.description: Stable identifier for one dated measurement cohort. A new re-measurement period must use a new campaign ID so changes over time remain visible.

exclude_from_aggregate.description: true for pilots or known-invalid observations retained for audit but excluded when ranked data exists

environment.description: user-supplied reproducibility detail: OS image, database versions, config choices

started_at.description: UTC timestamp at which this specific benchmark workload began.
